kpis.title: Requests Running
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("vllm_num_requests_running" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Request Throughput
kpis.sql:
WITH unp AS (
  UNPIVOT (SELECT timestamp, COLUMNS('^vllm_request_success_total/(stop|length)$') FROM {{view}})
      ON COLUMNS('^vllm_request_success_total/(stop|length)$') INTO NAME col VALUE v
),
rates AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         irate_lag(v,
                   LAG(v) OVER (PARTITION BY col ORDER BY timestamp),
                   timestamp - LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY col ORDER BY timestamp)) AS rate
  FROM unp
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t, SUM(rate) AS v
FROM rates GROUP BY timestamp

kpis.title: Completed Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_request_success_total/stop", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Failed Rate
kpis.sql:
WITH unp AS (
  UNPIVOT (SELECT timestamp, COLUMNS('^vllm_request_success_total/(error|repetition)$') FROM {{view}})
      ON COLUMNS('^vllm_request_success_total/(error|repetition)$') INTO NAME col VALUE v
),
rates AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         irate_lag(v,
                   LAG(v) OVER (PARTITION BY col ORDER BY timestamp),
                   timestamp - LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY col ORDER BY timestamp)) AS rate
  FROM unp
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t, SUM(rate) AS v
FROM rates GROUP BY timestamp

kpis.title: Abort Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_request_success_total/abort", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Truncated Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_request_success_total/length", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Evicted Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_num_preemptions_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Prompt Tokens per Request
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("vllm_request_prompt_tokens:buckets",
                  LAG("vllm_request_prompt_tokens:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.95)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL

kpis.title: KV Cache Usage
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("vllm_kv_cache_usage_perc" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Prefix Cache Hit Rate
kpis.sql:
SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t,
       irate_1s("vllm_prefix_cache_hits_total", timestamp)
         / NULLIF(irate_1s("vllm_prefix_cache_queries_total", timestamp), 0) AS v
FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Cached Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_prompt_tokens_cached_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t
